prompt: Replace the pineapple in the first image with the crowned pineapple from the second image, and then repaint the updated image using the impasto technique shown in the third image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the green pineapple on the left side of image 1 with the crowned, ripe pineapple from image 2. Subsequently, repaint the entire updated image using the thick, textured impasto painting technique demonstrated in image 3.
objects: crowned, ripe pineapple on the left side
